de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint

Class LineBreakpoint

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractBreakpoint
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.LineBreakpoint
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IBreakpoint

    public class LineBreakpoint
extends AbstractConditionalBreakpoint

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private String classPath
      The path of the class this LineBreakpoint is associated with.
      private int lineNumber
      The line of the Breakpoint in the respective class.
      protected int methodEnd
      The end of the method containing the associated Breakpoint
      protected int methodStart
      The start of the method containing the associated Breakpoint

      For a given StatementContainer this method computes the StatementBlock that contains all lines before the line the Breakpoint is at, including the line itself.

      Determines if the breakpoint represented by this BreakpointStopConition is triggered.

    • Field Detail

      • classPath

        private String classPath
        The path of the class this LineBreakpoint is associated with.

      • lineNumber

        private int lineNumber
        The line of the Breakpoint in the respective class.

      • methodStart

        protected int methodStart
        The start of the method containing the associated Breakpoint

      • methodEnd

        protected int methodEnd
        The end of the method containing the associated Breakpoint

    • Constructor Detail

      • LineBreakpoint

        public LineBreakpoint(String classPath,
              int lineNumber,
              int hitCount,
              IProgramMethod pm,
              Proof proof,
              String condition,
              boolean enabled,
              boolean conditionEnabled,
              int methodStart,
              int methodEnd)
               throws SLTranslationException
        Creates a new LineBreakpoint.
        Parameters:
        classPath - the path of the class the associated Breakpoint lies within
        lineNumber - the line where the associated Breakpoint is located in the class
        hitCount - the number of hits after which the execution should hold at this breakpoint
        pm - the IProgramMethod representing the Method which the Breakpoint is located at
        proof - the Proof that will be executed and should stop
        condition - the condition as given by the user
        enabled - flag if the Breakpoint is enabled
        conditionEnabled - flag if the condition is enabled
        methodStart - the line the containing method of this breakpoint starts at
        methodEnd - the line the containing method of this breakpoint ends at
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException - if the condition could not be parsed to a valid Term

    • Method Detail

      • getStatementBlock

        protected StatementBlock getStatementBlock(StatementContainer statementContainer)
        For a given StatementContainer this method computes the StatementBlock that contains all lines before the line the Breakpoint is at, including the line itself.
        Specified by:
        getStatementBlock in class AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
        Parameters:
        statementContainer - the StatementContainer to build the block from
        Returns:
        the StatementBlock representing the container without the line below the Breakpoint

      • shouldStopInLine

        protected boolean shouldStopInLine(int line,
                       String path)
        Checks if the execution should stop in the given line for the given class.
        Parameters:
        line - The current line of code, that the auto mode is evaluating
        path - The path of the Class, that contains the currently evaluated code
        Returns:
        true if a JavaLineBreakpoint is in the given line and the condition evaluates to true and the Hitcount is exceeded, false otherwise

      • isBreakpointHit

        public boolean isBreakpointHit(SourceElement activeStatement,
                      RuleApp ruleApp,
                      Proof proof,
                      Node node)
        Description copied from class: AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
        Determines if the breakpoint represented by this BreakpointStopConition is triggered. Override this method in order to suspend execution when a breakpoint is hit.
        Specified by:
        isBreakpointHit in interface IBreakpoint
        Overrides:
        isBreakpointHit in class AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
        Parameters:
        activeStatement - the activeStatement of the node
        ruleApp - the applied RuleApp
        proof - the current proof
        node - the current node
        Returns:
        true if execution should hold

      • isInLine

        private boolean isInLine(SourceElement activeStatement)

      • getLineNumber

        public int getLineNumber()
        Returns the line number of the associated Breakpoint.
        Returns:
        the line number of the associated Breakpoint

      • isInScope

        protected boolean isInScope(Node node)
        Description copied from class: AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
        Checks if the statement of a given Node is in the scope of this breakpoint.
        Specified by:
        isInScope in class AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
        Parameters:
        node - the Node to be checked
        Returns:
        true if the node represents a statement in the scope of this breakpoint.

      • isInScopeForCondition

        protected boolean isInScopeForCondition(Node node)
        Description copied from class: AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
        Checks if the statement of a given Node is in the scope of this breakpoint.
        Specified by:
        isInScopeForCondition in class AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
        Parameters:
        node - the Node to be checked
        Returns:
        true if the node represents a statement in the scope of this breakpoint.

        public String getClassPath()
        Returns:
